creator: liangtai.s16@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 170894
multimedia/qmmp-qt5: Switch version from 1.0.9 to 1.0.10

qmmp-1.0.10 has been released.  This minor upgraded version contains
* SID plugin improvement, and
* Updated translation.

Beside of this update, in Makefile:
* Declare more dependency information that the Q/A test claims, and
* Set PORTSCOUT to specify targeted version is 1.*, not 0.*.
